chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 726 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 13.10.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Saad Siddiqui, advocate for the respondent. Learned counsel, under instructions of applicant, does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. SCRA stands disposed of. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
